---
title: "Ebba Bayley"
---

## Ebba Bayley

**Dates:** (b. 1845/6)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

Daughter of William Rutter Bayley (1813/4-1879), J.P. of Cotford House, Sidbury, Sidmouth, she was  a Gosling as ‘Hoopoe’ [Devon 1851 census;  PO Devon 1873, Alumni Oxonienses; his will, he left 70,000]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
